description: This is a test suite for the Collapse component of a JavaScript UI library, testing its constructor, toggle, show, hide, dispose methods, and integration with jQuery, including various edge cases and DOM interactions.

classes.name: Collapse
classes.description: The Collapse class manages the expand/collapse behavior of UI elements, supporting configuration, event handling, and DOM manipulation.

methods.name: Collapse.getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Collapse instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: Collapse.getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Collapse instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: Collapse.jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery plugin interface for creating or interacting with Collapse instances.
